Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Heart Sage]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — The Heart Sage is choosing three Underlords from the young generation to represent Akura vassal states in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — The Heart Sage is the uncle of Aunt Charity.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — The Heart Sage crafted a goldsteel statue of Ekeri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — The Heart Sage lectured Yerin and Ruby.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Heart Sage can attack the mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Heart Sage can animate an army of silver ghosts.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — The Heart Sage saw that the people were gathered in the great hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — The Heart Sage looks like Mercy’s composed sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — The Heart Sage is approximately twenty years old and has purple eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Heart Sage is a person.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
